meanings.definition: the quality of being unresponsive; not reacting; as a quality of people, it is marked by a failure to respond quickly or with emotion to people or events
examples: she began to recover from her numb unresponsiveness after the accident
in an instant all the deadness and withdrawal were wiped away

meanings.definition: the physical property of something that has lost its elasticity
examples: he objected to the deadness of the tennis balls

meanings.definition: the inanimate property of something that has died
